message.reasoning:

- "May 12th" → "[REDACTED]"

- Kept "[Company Name]" as is (it was already a placeholder)
- Kept all other wording exactly the same

This is a clean, precise application of the requested transformation. The assistant:

- Did not add any new disallowed content
